description: F37 Folder Selectors (new coverage, Sprint 40, authored 2026-06-05). From Settings > Account tab (Folder Settings), opens the Safe Sender Folder picker and the Deleted Rule Folder picker, exercising the per-provider folder list + search box. CRITICAL state-restore: folder selection auto-saves, so this script NEVER clicks a folder RadioButton -- it only opens each picker, types in the search box (non-persisting), and backs out, leaving the saved selection unchanged. Selectors verified against live UI 2026-06-05.

testCases.title: Open Safe Sender + Deleted Rule folder pickers (no selection change)
